Operation 'getOptimization' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary uses awkward notation 'optimization(s)'. Description lacks clarity on what filtering options are available and what the response contains. Added specifics about retrieval modes, filtering capabilities, and response content to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand when to use filtering versus ID-based retrieval.

data.current_description: Retrieve a single optimization by ID, or retrieve multiple optimizations with filtering.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve optimization problem(s) by ID or filter
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve one or more optimization problems. Supports single retrieval by optimization ID or batch retrieval with optional filtering parameters. Returns optimization problem details including routes, addresses, and parameters. Filtering options allow narrowing results by status, date range, or other criteria.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses awkward notation 'optimization(s)'. Description lacks clarity on what filtering options are available and what the response contains. Added specifics about retrieval modes, filtering capabilities, and response content to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand when to use filtering versus ID-based retrieval.

message: Operation 'updateOptimization' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description lacks important details about partial update support, side effects (re-optimization), and return value. Added clarity on what can be updated, that partial updates are supported, the side effect of potential re-optimization, and what is returned to help AI agents understand the operation's full impact.

data.current_description: Update an existing optimization problem, such as adding addresses or changing parameters.
data.description_suggestion: Update an existing optimization problem by modifying route parameters or addresses. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Updating addresses or parameters may trigger re-optimization of affected routes. Returns the updated optimization problem with recalculated routes if applicable.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description lacks important details about partial update support, side effects (re-optimization), and return value. Added clarity on what can be updated, that partial updates are supported, the side effect of potential re-optimization, and what is returned to help AI agents understand the operation's full impact.

message: Operation 'deleteOptimization' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and lacks critical information about permanence, what gets deleted (associated routes and data), required parameters, and return value. Added details about irreversibility, scope of deletion, and response format to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation and use it appropriately.

data.description_suggestion: Delete an optimization problem and all associated routes and data. This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Requires the optimization ID as a parameter. Returns a success confirmation or error response. Associated route assignments and tracking data will be removed.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and lacks critical information about permanence, what gets deleted (associated routes and data), required parameters, and return value. Added details about irreversibility, scope of deletion, and response format to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation and use it appropriately.

message: Operation 'getActivities' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and concise. Description is vague about what constitutes 'events and changes' and lacks information about filtering capabilities, pagination, and response structure. Added specifics about supported filters, response format (paginated Activity objects), and use cases to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve the activity feed with recent events and changes.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the activity feed containing recent system events and changes. Supports filtering by date range, event type, or resource ID. Returns a paginated list of Activity objects with timestamps, event descriptions, and affected resources. Useful for tracking optimization changes, route updates, and system modifications.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and concise. Description is vague about what constitutes 'events and changes' and lacks information about filtering capabilities, pagination, and response structure. Added specifics about supported filters, response format (paginated Activity objects), and use cases to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.
